title: Gux - Zelda CD-i experience
description:
This is a video set to the Zelda CD-i experience remix by Gux as found on Something Awful.
This didn't come out as I wanted, but I wanted to upload this by new years.
Get this song, and all the other ones at.
http://www.somethingawful.com/d/flash-tub/zelda-cdi-remix.php
